name: superpower-copilot
description: 13 AI workflow agents for GitHub Copilot: brainstorm, plan, execute, verify, finish, TDD, debug, review, respond, UI design, think, mentor, context

languageModelTools.name: superpower-copilot_options
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Present a question with 2-4 options to the user as an interactive sidebar panel. Use this tool whenever you need to ask the user a question with predefined choices. The user selects options and the result is returned. Supports single-select, multi-select, and free text input. Always use this tool instead of writing options as plain text in your response.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Show interactive options in the sidebar for the user to choose from

title.description: The question or title to display

options.description: 2-4 options for the user to choose from

group.description: Optional group name for visual grouping

mode.description: Selection mode: 'single' (default, click to submit) or 'multi' (toggle + confirm)

allowFreeText.description: Whether to show a free text input area

freeTextPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the free text area
